{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Underlord prince
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] fought an [[Underlord prince]] as a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
